properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: So many years have passed Yet still we're here Standing on the rock of revelation Our faith in God's word will never fade away For in Him alone is our truest home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's almost home time We'll soon be leaving for the other side And meet our Maker there, and all the pain and tears All things that we've fear will be gone away, our souls will be at rest And we will all be blessed into that dwelling place we are homesick for It's almost home time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The end of time is drawing near Prophecies and signs are fulfilled Babylon is falling, Jerusalem is rising Will soon fulfill our destiny

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The head stone has come down Becoming one with us We will soon be changed As Heaven and Earth become one
